UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PLAINTIFFS JANET LENZINI AND JANE ARONOWICZ'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT TO COMPLY WITH PLAINTIFFS SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE) AND DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS (SET ONE), AND FOR A MONETARY SANCTION IS GRANTED. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-18-2015 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2014 Set For Trial On Jun-15-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant To Comply With Plaintiffs Special Interrogatories (Set One) And Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents (Set One), And For A Monetary Sanction
Off Calendar Nov-03-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Andrew Westley, Esq. (415-362-2817) for PLaintiffs and moving party Janet Lenzini and Jane Aronowicz.
No other appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFFS JANET LENZINI and JANE ARONOWICZ's Motion To Compel Defendant To Comply With Plaintiffs Special Interrogatories (Set One) And Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents (Set One), And For A Monetary Sanction is GRANTED. The Court orders Defendant to pay $1740 in sanctions and fees. Order signed. (see scanned order for details) Judge: Lynn O'Malley-Taylor, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
